title: Romanian Transit Collection
description: This is a resource pack adding 4 announcement sounds in Romanian railway stations, some custom signs, and some train models for Minecraft Transit Railway Mod!
body: [](https://modrinth.com/mod/bubustein-money) [](https://modrinth.com/modpack/bubustein) # BUBUSTEIN Transit Collection This resource pack adds all announcement sounds intro from the Romanian railway station. If you want to use this in your modpack, you must ask me for permission! Join our discord server. ## Sounds 1. "Glasul Rotilor de tren" 2. "Crai Nou" 3. "Marsul lui Iancu" 4. "Hora Unirii" ## Custom Signs 1. STB logo (reworked) 2. Metrorex logo (reworked) 3. CFR logo (reworked) ## New Train Models Class 377 (in 4 textures) (2.0 version) ## REQUIRE MODS: **FORGE:** Architectury API, Minecraft Transit Railway, Nemo's Transit Expansion **FABRIC:** Fabric API, Minecraft Transit Railway, Nemo's Transit Expansion **QUILT:** QSL API, Minecraft Transit Railway, Nemo's Transit Expansion ## Our Modpacks: *BUBUSTEIN's Roleplay Modpack:* https://modrinth.com/modpack/bubustein *BUBUSTEIN's Survival Modpack:* https://modrinth.com/modpack/bubusteins-survival
